title: Vanquishing the Giro-Tour Double: Stephen Roche Scrutinizes Vingegaard’s Chances
content:
Stephen Roche won both races in 1987. Does Jonas Vingegaard have a hope of doing the same?

Read the full article at Vanquishing the Giro-Tour Double: Stephen Roche Scrutinizes Vingegaard’s Chances on Velo.
author: sstokes
